_comment: exp_034 — SFT v2 hail mary. Documented 'if GRPO stalls' lever; GRPO stalled (exp_029 pass-5 regressed to 0.586). Fixes exp_008's two root causes: (a) base = qwen3-4b-thinking-grpo-pass2 (Thinking-family, NOT non-thinking Qwen3-4B); (b) data includes BOTH free-form (NuminaMath-CoT 5k) AND MCQ (MathQA 2k), wrapped programmatically as <think>{rationale}</think>\n\n\boxed{answer}. Two-phase train: probe@500ex (~1h) -> dev-probe gate -> full@7000ex (~6-8h). Gate prevents exp_008-style 2-day loss. HFPushAdapterCallback every save_steps so 12h DSMLP ceiling can resume in a second pod.

data._format_note: Both sources wrapped as <think>{rationale}</think>\n\n\boxed{{answer}}. MathQA's correct_option index -> letter (a..e); kept lowercase since MathQA convention. Free-form answers kept verbatim from NuminaMath's 'answer' field. Examples whose wrapped length > max_seq_len are dropped during prep.

lora._dropout_note: dropout=0 per feedback_grpo_gotchas memory — non-zero LoRA dropout causes silent training failures with TRL/PEFT.

train._dtype_note: fp16 not bf16 — DSMLP A5000 supports bf16 but we want byte-compat with Kaggle T4 inference where the merged model will run.

probe_gate._comment: Pre-committed gate after probe@500ex. If ANY threshold fails, abort the full train. Catches exp_008's MCQ catastrophic forgetting in ~3h instead of ~2 days.
probe_gate._mcq_note: pass-2 dev MCQ baseline = 62.00% (exp_017 dev_subset). >5pp drop = MCQ forgetting starting; abort.
probe_gate._extract_note: SFT can silently wash out the boxed{} format adherence that GRPO baked in. <95% extraction = format degradation; abort.
probe_gate._ff_note: pass-2 dev FF baseline = 53.00%. Below baseline = SFT is hurting what we're trying to improve; abort.

final_gate._comment: Pre-committed gate after full training, on dev (200q) then board. Both must pass to layer rescue.
final_gate._dev_note: Probe gate enforces ≥53 FF / ≥60 MCQ; for FULL to be worth submitting, FF needs to exceed +2pp (55%+) since the cost of a board slot is non-trivial.
final_gate._board_note: exp_017 stage-1 raw = 0.586. Stage-1 board >= +0.010 (≈0.596+) -> promote to rescue layer. <0 -> discard.
final_gate._deadline_note: If probe + full + dev + board isn't done by day 3 (2026-05-27), abandon SFT v2 and lock exp_018 (0.628) as final — leaves 3 safe days.
